Companies · stages · markets

Startup and product organization directory

Cards foreground founding year, geography, product thesis, and category tags so you can compare operators the same way you compare people. The small year chip on each card is a quick archive-age signal.

People directory How dossiers are built

Ecosystem clusters

Year and country filters sync into the URL so you can bookmark a shortlist.

Company directory

Startups with stages, tags, and source links

Funding-era hints via founding yearComparable card anatomyShared search indexOutbound sources in profiles

Search by name, role, country, market segment or technology tag.

Filters and search stay in the URL so you can share a link.

Editorial methodology

Editorial methodology

Cards stay cover-free: company name, sector line, and a readable shorthand on the surface; imagery and long-form context sit on the dossier page. When numbers or positioning drift, refresh through the editorial process.

Read methodology
